description: Style NoteRevel in the luxurious comfort of superior quality cotton fabric in this camisole from hanes. Its spaghetti top style offers a flattering and comfortable Fit. Featuring adjustable spaghetti style adjustable straps, this piece provides total flexibility and leaves no marks on your skin. Printed branding provides scrach free comfort.Product DetailsNude camisole with spaghetti style adjustable strapsMaterials and Care95% cotton and 5% spandexMachine wash warmDo not ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
